titles.title: Veterans SPORT Act
Veterans SPORT Act
Veterans Supporting Prosthetics Opportunities and Recreational Therapy Act

A bill to amend title 38, United States Code, to include adaptive prostheses and terminal devices for sports and other recreational activities in the medical services furnished to eligible veterans by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
Committee on Veterans' Affairs. Ordered to be reported with an amendment in the nature of a substitute favorably.

committee.name: Senate Veterans' Affairs
committee.activity: Markup By, Referred To, Referred To
